70010000126709.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000126709.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000071071.description:
Prepare for a journey to a galaxy far, far away! Whether you’re bartering in the desert sands or marching in formation, these pre-order bonuses will make your next game night feel like you’ve scavenged treasure in the Outer Rim.

Pre-Order Bonus

Jawa: Roll with the resourcefulness of a Tatooine scavenger. Perfect for finding luck in the most unlikely places!

Stormtrooper: Bring order to the board with the iconic Galactic Empire soldier. Don’t worry – these dice won’t miss their target!
70050000071071.name: Pre-Order Bonus – Set of Dice

70050000072681.description: This is an upgrade pack that allows you to upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ software “Dark Auction” to “Dark Auction Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition.”
70050000072681.intro:
The Auction of Dark Memories Begins Now.
What truths await beyond a bid made with your life?
70050000072681.name: Dark Auction - Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000073474.description: This is an Upgrade Pack, if you already own Unrailed 2: Back on Track for Nintendo Switch™, you can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition using this product.
70050000073474.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70050000073474.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000097762.description:
Under the fluttering cherry blossoms on the streets of Japan, your cross-cultural romance adventure begins now! The game authentically recreates famous Japanese landmarks, where four distinctively charming Japanese girls await to meet you. Amid sweet dates, a life-or-death chase suddenly erupts on Tokyo’s late-night streets, and you accidentally stumble upon the underworld’s dark dealings of power and lust – beneath the romantic surface, a surging undercurrent of life-and-death choices lies hidden. Scenes you never dared to imagine come at you one after another! Tear through the crisis with courage, lock onto true feelings with perfect chemistry.

Deadly Charm・Japanese Heroine Gallery
An energetic anime-style cosplayer, a cool goddess who practices kendo and rides a motorcycle, a millionaire female CEO, a Japanese idol with no control over her own fate… Loli girls, graceful onee-sama, pure first loves — sweet, spicy, or dark, fierce, dashing, or gentle! All the most iconic personality types from Japanese anime and dramas are gathered here. Each is a full-fledged Japanese heroine with powerful presence. At least one of them will make your heart race uncontrollably.

Desperate Run・Tokyo Survival Files
A Tokyo adventure! In a second, you’re pulled into a real J-drama world. The story twists and turns, making your emotions surge out of control. Unpredictable plot developments, challenges full of surprise and fun — skill battles, chases, kidnappings, one wrong step and you lose your life. Go head-to-head with classic J-drama villains. All the excitement from a first-person perspective. Did you really think you were just here for a date?

Real-shot Impact・Immersive Japan Pilgrimage
Over 20 real-life shots of popular Japanese photo spots — real sunlight, real nightscapes come right at you. Akihabara, Kamakura, Tokyo Tower, Yokohama Cosmoclock… famous locations from numerous anime and manga, plus spectacular Japanese festivals and cultural scenes you’ve never seen before! Without leaving home, you can feel the streets of Japan across the ocean, immerse yourself, experience firsthand just how wonderful Japanese life can be, and witness the mind-blowing collision that breaks through the dimensional wall.
70010000097762.intro:
Cherry blossoms fall, hearts race wild.
Fall in love – or fight for your life.
Real Japan, real danger, real romance.
70010000097762.name: Blossom Voyage

70010000106263.description:
From the moment you arrive, attention feels natural.

The hotel is elegant and relaxed, but the atmosphere carries something more. Certain women notice you immediately. Their interest isn’t rushed, it’s assured. Smiles come easily. Conversations feel effortless. And when they speak, it’s clear they know exactly what they want.

In Mom Crush: Hidden Hotel Love Story, you step into a narrative built around confidence, attraction, and being desired. This isn’t about chasing attention, it’s about responding to it.

These women are experienced, self-assured, and direct in their own way. They enjoy testing chemistry, guiding conversations, and deciding when to move closer. Your role is to recognise the moment, match their energy, and choose how far each connection goes.

This visual novel focuses on chemistry, presence, and the appeal of being wanted, all within a refined, relaxed hotel setting.

Let them make the first move.
Decide how the story ends.


Features

● ADULT ROMANCE VISUAL NOVEL: A story centred on attraction, confidence, and mature relationships.

● CONFIDENCE DRIVEN CHOICES: Your responses influence desire, chemistry, and how women react to you.

● MULTIPLE ROUTES & ENDINGS: Each relationship follows a distinct path based on your decisions.

● CHARACTER LED ROMANCE: Women with strong presence, personality, and intention.

● ELEGANT HOTEL SETTING: A luxurious vacation backdrop that enhances mood and connection.

● ANIME VISUAL NOVEL STYLE: Stylish character art that emphasises expression and chemistry.


Choose carefully who you let close.
70010000106263.intro:
Confident women.
Undeniable attraction.
A story where you’re chosen.
70010000106263.name: Mom Crush: Hidden Hotel Love Story

70010000106285.description:
The hotel looks peaceful at first.
Sunlit corridors, quiet lounges, and guests who seem perfectly composed.

But attention lingers in subtle ways.
A glance held for a second too long.
A conversation that shifts without warning.
Men whose confidence feels practiced… and intentional.

In Sugar Daddy Crush: Hidden Hotel Love Story, you step into an adult narrative focused on attraction, restraint, and emotional timing. 

Your stay becomes a series of encounters shaped by dialogue, perception, and the choices you make in each moment.

These are men who value control, image, and experience. Getting closer isn’t about bold gestures, but about understanding when to speak, when to wait, and when silence says more than words.

Every response affects how relationships unfold. What feels casual may open unexpected paths, while a single misstep can quietly close a connection before it begins. 

Trust builds gradually through shared moments, unspoken interest, and the sense of being noticed.

As the days pass, motivations surface, boundaries shift, and the hotel reveals more than its elegant exterior suggests. Not every path leads to romance, and not every story ends the same.

This is a visual novel driven by atmosphere, character presence, and the tension between curiosity and restraint.


Features:

● ADULT STORY DRIVEN VISUAL NOVEL: A narrative experience focused on mature relationships, subtle attraction, and emotional tension.

● CHOICE BASED DIALOGUE: Every response influences trust, distance, and how each connection evolves.

● MULTIPLE ROUTES & ENDINGS: Different paths lead to distinct outcomes shaped by your decisions.

● CHARACTER FOCUSED ENCOUNTERS: Each guest brings his own presence, pace, and boundaries to the story.

● ATMOSPHERIC HOTEL SETTING: A refined vacation backdrop where quiet moments carry meaning.

● ANIME VISUAL NOVEL: Expressive character art designed to highlight mood and emotion.


Choose carefully who you let close.
70010000106285.intro:
Elegant men.
Hidden intentions.
A love story you control.
70010000106285.name: Sugar Daddy Crush: Hidden Hotel Love Story

70010000109498.description:
Mori Carta is a handless deckbuilding roguelike. Choose left or right on every card to adventure through stories. Simple decisions lead to rich and rewarding gameplay. Four dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets, more than 1000 playable cards, over 185 unique enemies.

Features:
Deceptively simple controls: Almost every interaction in the game is handled by moving left or right.

Engaging story: Adventure with a colourful cast of characters that accompany you on your adventures.

Rich depth of builds and combos: Choosing cards to add to your deck will be critical in surviving your adventures. With over 1000 cards, the combinations are endless.

4 dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets.
1000+ playable cards.
185 unique enemies.
70010000109498.intro: Decide fast. Build smart. Survive longer.
70010000109498.name: Mori Carta

70010000112445.description:
Help Xi navigate a five-day time loop and figure out what happened to her memories in a vast hand-drawn world.
 
Together with her companion, Ouro, travel through a true metroidvania world where time changes the terrain in subtle ways. Escape the loop through exploration and battle. Change Xi’s fate and learn the truth of the Dragon Loop!
 
• Turn Bosses into Summonable Spirits
 
Defeat a wide range of interesting bosses to get exclusive summonable spirits. Destroy your foes with powerful Explosive Spirits, or summon Persistent Spirit companions to follow you around. Upgrade and evolve both types to enhance their combat power!
 
• Multipurpose Metroidvania Powers
 
Find rare Pearls to summon powerful tools that help you traverse the world. Spiky pufferfish, magnetic boxes, a vacuuming whale spirit… and more. Each has multiple uses in both combat and traversing the world, unlocking many ways to play!
 
• Fast-Paced Exciting Battles
 
Combine Xi’s strength with Ouro’s agility in fast-paced combat. Play well, manage your X-Rating, and boost your speed and combat power even further in this fast-paced combat system with no contact damage.
 
• Branches in Time
 
In Dragon Loop, time is a limited resource. Use your five days wisely and plan your routes through an easily-navigable Time Map. Explore and open up new worldlines to see how things play out differently. But don’t worry: this isn’t a roguelike; you never start from scratch.
70010000112445.intro: Escape The Time Loop In This Open-World Metroidvania
70010000112445.name: Dragon Loop

70010000120978.description:
No cover. No limits. Just pure action.
Enter a brutal battlefield where speed, aggression, and constant movement are the only way to survive. Serious Carnage - Adrenaline Shooter throws you into intense arena-based combat where waves of enemies never stop and every second pushes your reflexes to the limit.

Fight through closed arenas filled with enemies, where portals open and unleash continuous waves of threats. You’re forced to stay in motion, switch weapons on the fly, and react instantly as the pressure builds with every encounter.

Use a wide arsenal of powerful weapons, each designed for a different combat style. From precision shots to heavy explosive damage, every choice changes how you handle the chaos around you. Enemies range from fast and aggressive units to stronger elite forces and massive bosses that require skill and timing to defeat.

Defeat enemies, collect souls, and push your limits to activate powerful abilities that turn the fight in your favor.  Aggressive gameplay is rewarded, encouraging you to stay in the action and take control of every arena.

Key Features:
	•	Non-stop arena combat with constant pressure
	•	Wave-based encounters that keep escalating
	•	Fast movement built around aggression
	•	Weapon variety for different combat styles
	•	Rage Mode that shifts the fight in your favor
	•	Boss fights that test timing and control

The pressure keeps building with every wave.
Only those who stay in control make it through.
70010000120978.name: Serious Carnage - Adrenaline Shooter

70010000122652.description:
Let's go fishing on the Nintendo Switch™!
Travel to different world locations like North America, Europe, Africa, and the Amazon!
Each spot is home to lots of unique fish to discover!
Play solo, or compete with up to 4 players using one Joy-Con™ each!
Become the world's greatest angler!

[Score Attack]
Catch as many fish as you can within the time limit!
Look out for big fish to boost your score!

[Endless]
Sit back, relax, and enjoy endless fishing!
Watch the scenery shift from day to night!
Change your gear when the situation calls and search for big catches!

[Ranking]
Compete against players around the world in Score Attack and Endless modes!
Show off your skills by increasing your high score and rank!

[Battle]
Compete with up to 4 players for the highest score!
Face off against CPUs in single-player mode!

[Shop]
Spend the points you've earned from fishing to buy new lures and rods!
Discover the perfect combination for your fishing style!

[Records]
Every fish you catch will be added to your personal encyclopaedia!
70010000122652.intro:
Embark on a fishing adventure around the world!
Cast your line and reel in fish from across the globe!
70010000122652.name: Reel it! World Fishing

70010000123847.description:
He has thousands of followers, a perfect setup, and a presence that stops the scroll.

Getting his attention is already hard.
Getting a date? Even harder.
Making him fall for you? That's the real challenge.

Each one with his own channel, his own vibe, his own reason to be impossible to forget. Work your way up, get on their radar, and earn your way into their world.

Because behind the camera, they're just guys who want someone real.

The question is whether that someone is you.

Features:

● DATE YOUTUBERS: Each guy is a star in his own right. Gaming, lifestyle, drama, the ones who never show their face. Get close enough and find out who he really is when the camera's off.

● MAKE HIM NOTICE YOU: He has thousands of fans. You have one shot. Go on dates around the city, say the right things, and become the one he actually thinks about.

● KEEP THE CHAT GOING: Text him between dates. Don't go cold. Guys who get a lot of attention drop fast the ones who don't keep up.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: The closer he lets you in, the more he shares. Things his subscribers will never see.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Not every story ends the same. How far you get depends entirely on you.


A guy with millions of eyes on him.
Completely out of reach.
Or is he?

Prove you're worth his time.
70010000123847.intro:
Millions watch him.
Do you think you can make him look at you?
70010000123847.name: Youtuber Boys: Love Behind the Camera

70070000037002.description:
Travel the world and sharpen your detective skills with the ultimate Spy Guy vacation bundle! Explore the vibrant streets of Rome, discover the sunny coasts of Croatia, uncover secrets among the ancient wonders of Greece, and dive into the colorful atmosphere of Indonesia.

This special collection includes:

Spy Guy Roma
Spy Guy Croatia
Spy Guy Greece
Spy Guy Indonesia
Spy Guy Seaside

Each adventure is packed with hidden objects, charming locations, and exciting mysteries to solve. Become an even greater detective as you travel across breathtaking holiday destinations and help Spy Guy crack every case!
70070000037002.name: Spy Guy Vacation Bundle

70010000109689.description: You are trapped in a dark corridor. Pay close attention to every detail, because only by noticing the anomalies will you be able to find the path to Entrance 8.
70010000109689.intro: The anomalies will lead you to “Entrance 8.” You seem to be living a nightmare.
70010000109689.name: Entrance 8

70010000119628.description:
Astrid wakes up in Purgatory and she doesn't remember anything. 

Point and click your way through adventure-based gameplay mixed with visual novel storytelling. Solve the mystery of our heroine's unexplained and unusual death. 

Experience a heartfelt story where your choices matter, with five different interactive routes. Feel your way through a charming, funny, dramatic and moving narrative full of compelling characters, brought to life by partial voice acting.


Features:
* Visual novel narrative with choices
* Point and click adventure gameplay
* Beautiful, unique art style
* Unlock 70+ hidden items
* Partial voice acting
* Original soundtrack composed by Endigo
70010000119628.intro: Solve the mystery of Astrid’s untimely demise in this visual novel.
70010000119628.name: Pitstop in Purgatory

70010000121584.description:
Transform empty rooms into warm, cozy spaces in Cozy Home Unpacking - a relaxing organization and decoration simulator where every box hides a new story. Unpack furniture, place decorations, organize everyday items, and slowly turn simple apartments into beautiful homes filled with comfort and personality.

Take your time as you decorate bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, and tiny cozy corners exactly the way you want. Arrange books, plants, posters, kitchenware, toys, and dozens of charming objects while enjoying a calm atmosphere and satisfying gameplay.

With soft visuals, relaxing vibes, and stress-free gameplay, Cozy Home Unpacking is the perfect experience for players who love decorating, organizing, and creating peaceful spaces.
70010000121584.intro: Make Every Room Feel Like Home.
70010000121584.name: Cozy Home Unpacking

70010000123215.description:
Explore a quiet and cosy office from the perspective of a curious little cat in Little Kitty Meow, a relaxing adventure focused on atmosphere, exploration, and peaceful wandering.

Walk through office rooms, meeting areas, corridors, and workspaces while discovering hidden corners, cosy spots, and small environmental details that bring the workplace to life. Enjoy calm exploration, soft visuals, and a comforting atmosphere as you freely roam through the office at your own pace.

With relaxing gameplay and charming environments, Little Kitty Meow offers a simple and wholesome experience perfect for players who enjoy cosy exploration games.
70010000123215.name: Little Kitty Meow

70010000100976.description:
#DRIVE Rally is an arcade-inspired rally racing game set in the golden racing era of the 1990s. Grab your co-driver and burn rubber in iconic, race-winning cars across varied rally stages and terrains in some of the most recognizable rallying locations in the world—perfect for fans of retro racing games and newcomers alike.

From the sunny landscapes of Dry Crumbs, through the whispering woods of Holzberg, to the chilly wilderness of Revontuli; take a journey through a diverse world you haven’t experienced in racing games before. Each destination delivers distinctive stage design and visual flair that celebrate classic ’90s rally vibes.

Jump behind the wheel of legendary rally cars, including Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond, and many more. Build and customize your cars from the ground up to match your driving style and rally your way. Personalize the body, paintwork, and decals, then add that cherry on top with custom decorations - create a ride that feels truly your own.

Don’t forget the co-driver! Your co-driver can be your biggest cheerleader and toughest judge. It’s a partnership that thrives on performance and emotion. Their goal is to assist your runs with helpful navigation and tips to improve your stage times - making every run feel dynamic and replayable.

Features
• The spirit of ’90s rally for players of all ages and generations

• Exciting driving mechanics, simple to start but demanding in depth

• Stunning rally tracks and locations inspired by the world

• Retro-inspired cars with awesome personalization and car customization options

• Compete on online leaderboards to be the best and prove your rally skills
70010000100976.intro: Put your foot down and redefine speed in #DRIVE Rally!
70010000100976.name: #DRIVE Rally

70010000119818.description: Learn to react quickly to unconventional situations. Maneuver your way through sneaky enemies and use your attacks to destroy planetary defenses.
70010000119818.intro: Fire up your blasters and smash through any planet's defenses!
70010000119818.name: Planet Divers

70010000121246.description:
Welcome to Enterprise Corp.
We are pleased to have you.

Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so.

The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.
Good performance will result in promotions within the corporate hierarchy.
Poor performance will have immediate consequences.

There is no need to understand the internal workings of the processes.
All relevant information will be provided when appropriate.

The system does not make mistakes.
The system records every action.

Thank you for your interest in becoming part of Enterprise Corp.

In “Just. Press. The Button.”, every action counts and every decision defines you. Explore a world where obedience to rules is not optional and promotions come with increasing expectations. "Just. Press. The Button." places you face to face with routine and constant corporate pressure as you attempt to maintain your position within the hierarchy.

Prepare for a dystopian experience that blends the race for success, monotony, tension, and the consequences of every step, all while the system watches, evaluates, and records your every move.
70010000121246.name: Just. Press. The Button.

70010000123395.description:
Enter a surreal platforming adventure where the world constantly changes around you. This is more than a journey through obstacles - it’s a challenge where the environment itself becomes part of the puzzle.

Using the power of a rotating, you’ll manipulate the world to find new paths, avoid dangers, and uncover hidden ways forward. Every level introduces fresh challenges that test your reflexes, timing, and ability to adapt to changing surroundings.

Collect coins, overcome mind-bending platforming sequences, and take on intense encounters where the entire arena shifts and moves beneath your feet. Some stages demand speed and precision, while others reward careful observation and creative thinking.

Blending dynamic gameplay, puzzle-solving, and fast-paced action, this adventure invites you to master a world where nothing stays still for long.
70010000123395.name: Inversion: The Single Path

70010000124695.description:
No roads. No limits. Only the path you choose.

Take control of powerful 4x4 vehicles and explore wild, unpredictable environments where every decision matters. In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, the focus is not speed — it’s control, planning, and the ability to overcome challenging terrain.

Drive through mud, snow, sand, and rocky landscapes where each surface affects your movement and forces you to adapt. Choosing the right path becomes essential as you navigate through difficult conditions, avoid hazards, and complete missions in remote locations.

Every mission is an expedition. You deliver cargo, locate objectives, rescue targets, and explore unknown areas while managing your vehicle’s performance. Damage, terrain resistance, and route selection all impact your progress, making each journey a test of skill and patience.

There are no fixed roads — you decide how to reach your destination. Explore different routes, discover hidden areas, and uncover pieces of a larger story as you move through diverse environments inspired by real-world locations

Key Features:
	•	Drive through terrain that constantly pushes your control
	•	Plan your route instead of following fixed roads
	•	Complete missions built around exploration and precision
	•	Manage your vehicle and overcome natural obstacles
	•	Progress through increasingly demanding environments
Take your time, choose your path, and push your limits.
In Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator, every journey is about control, strategy, and exploration.
70010000124695.name: Offroad Craft Runner 4x4 Simulator

70070000037017.description:
Pets and Friends: Summer Vibes is a cozy sticker album that lets you create your own charming collages inspired by the magic of summer. Arrange unique compositions, decorate beautiful pages, and design delightful artworks filled with adorable animals and sunny decorations.

Enjoy relaxing gameplay perfect for long summer evenings, express your creativity, and have fun with additional mini-games. Along the way, you’ll also discover interesting animal facts that make every moment in the game even more special.

Pets and Friends: Summer Vibes is the perfect experience for fans of cozy games, creative fun, and warm vacation vibes.
70070000037017.name: Pets and Friends Summer Vibes

70010000123208.description:
Infiltrate a luxury hotel and complete different tasks. Quiet paws and a bit of attitude are all you need for success!

- A Cat’s Eye View
See the world from just four inches off the ground. Explore the cozy hotel lobby as a curious little cat, wandering through warm lounges, reception areas, sofas, plants, luggage corners, and decorative spaces filled with charm and relaxing atmosphere.

- Cozy Hotel Atmosphere
Enjoy a calm and peaceful experience focused on exploration and cozy vibes. Soft lighting, relaxing music, and detailed interiors turn the hotel hall into a warm and comforting place perfect for quiet adventures.

- Playful Exploration
Jump onto counters, walk across furniture, rest in cozy corners, and freely explore the hotel lobby at your own pace. Every small detail of the environment helps create a relaxing and charming experience.

- A Warm Living Space
The entire game takes place inside a hotel hall designed to feel alive, stylish, and welcoming. From the reception desk to lounge areas and decorative corners, the lobby is filled with cozy visual details and relaxing ambiance.
70010000123208.intro: A charming adventure from a cat's perspective.
70010000123208.name: Strays POV Tales

70010000103345.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103345.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103345.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000119730.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armored cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119730.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119730.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000119812.description: Making a sandwich is not as easy as it seems. There are many obstacles to overcome in the kitchen to make a delicious meal. You have to be sure to use all the tasty ingredients in the right order. Give it a try and see if you can do it!
70010000119812.intro: Want to know how sandwiches are really made?
70010000119812.name: Run, Sandwich, Run!

70010000121291.description:
The World Cup has been stolen by aliens and it's up to you to get it back! 

Soccer Kid is an innovative 2D platformer that challenges you to navigate the world using only your soccer skills. Instead of just running and jumping, you'll need to dribble, header, and kick your way through enemies and obstacles across the globe.

This QUByte Classics edition brings the ultimate nostalgic package to your Nintendo Switch™.
70010000121291.intro: A classic platformer where your soccer ball is your weapon!
70010000121291.name: Soccer Kid Collection (QUByte Classics)

70010000123974.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society."


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123974.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123974.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70050000072125.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a heavy Gunner-class combat monster truck built for explosive arena racing. With massive tyres, armoured bodywork, and mounted weapons, it is ready to crush rivals and tear through post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Judgment Day, increases the damage of rocket attacks when activated, giving Razor extra firepower in combat.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000072125.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customisation items.
70050000072125.name: RACE - Razor Pack

70010000122560.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122560.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122560.name: The Artifactory

70050000070125.description:
This DLC unlocks a brand new world for hexceed: Centaurus! 
Puzzle your way through 140 brand-new levels!
70050000070125.intro: Unlocks a new world for hexceed: Centaurus brings 140 new puzzles and includes all mechanics from the previous DLC.
70050000070125.name: Centaurus

70050000070553.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070553.name: Between Worlds

70050000073550.description:
This Diorama set includes the following:

- 20 new levels

- 20 Hidden jigsaw pieces to complete 4 new collectibles!

- 40 new stickers to decorate your photos!
70050000073550.intro: Discover and find the differences in the new handcrafted diorama set from Tiny Lands 2.
70050000073550.name: Diorama set 1

70050000058969.description:
Delve deeper into the eerie lands of The Spiral. 

This additional tale enriches the experience and let you uncover hidden secrets, new perspectives, and unexpected horrors.
70050000058969.name: Little Nightmares III - First Additional Chapter

70050000046471.description: The Painted Red Crime Scene includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens
70050000046471.name: Cluedo - Painted Red

70010000122819.description:
Anyone can feel the flow in Rhythm Paradise Groove! Discover a colourful collection of funny little rhythm games, including music by renowned Japanese producer Tsunku♂.

You can do anything with rhythm! 
No matter how strange the situation, the rules are always the same: just press buttons in time with the beat! Hop through hoops, catch flying vegetables, swing sledgehammers, and much more – perform surprising feats with the music as your guide!
70010000122819.name: Rhythm Paradise Groove

70010000125189.description: Gather, control, and lead your army on the road to glory. No obstacle can stop you. Prepare for the final battle and defeat every opponent along the way. Lead the army with care - your soldiers believe in you!
70010000125189.intro: Gather and lead your army to the finish line! Face your enemies and win the battle!
70010000125189.name: The Boys Escape

70010000113011.description:
A 2D pixel art roguelike space shooter with plugged resource management, procedural levels and challenging bosses! Hold the controls tight and do not get stranded in the void!

PLUG 'N' SHOOT

- Plug in to recharge your energy and manage your resources.
- Be Careful! Once plugged, you'll only be able to move within the range of your cable!
- Space is plunged into darkness, activate the spacesockets to clear a level and travel to the next sector.

FIGHT

- Choose between 10+ different ships with different gameplay modes!
- Blast your mega-laser!
- Form an army of rescued stranded ships that will fight alongside you!
- Destroy the stages and defeat a large variety of enemies!
- Encounter dangerous and challenging BOSSES after each galaxy in your quest.

SLOW DOWN TIME

Holding the breach, dodging enemy bullets, and piloting through narrow hallways shouldn't be a problem, BUT just in case...
- Your ship is equipped with a futuristic Slow-Mo System that you can use almost whenever you want!
- Luckily for you, it recharges by collecting energy from dead enemies!

UPGRADE

- Pick up BATTERIES and discover +250 combinations of bullet modifiers!
- Get CHIPS of temporary upgrades by destroying enemies!
- Choose between more than 40 upgrades for your ship.
- Optimize charge times, improve your firepower, get more cable length...
- Become invisible to enemies.

And more!
70010000113011.intro: Hyperwired is a roguelike top-down action shooter, where your spaceship has a plug hanging from it.
70010000113011.name: HYPERWIRED

70010000124876.description: New gameplay of the classic snake game. Collect the colour you need to complete the levels. Pick up boosts to make things easier. Change skins to make your snake look stylish and unique!
70010000124876.intro: A mix of Snakes and Colours for an exciting gameplay experience!
70010000124876.name: Color Snake

70010000110954.description:
Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Standard Edition. A Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.
70010000110954.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger

70010000122162.description:
Create the workspace of your dreams in My Cozy Workspace - a relaxing simulator where creativity, comfort, and productivity come together. Design and customize rooms by placing furniture, organizing accessories, decorating shelves, and building a cozy atmosphere that feels uniquely yours.

Arrange desks, plants, books, lights, and dozens of decorative items while transforming small empty spaces into inspiring work, whether you prefer a minimalist office, a colorful creative studio, or a warm workspace corner.

Take your time, experiment with different layouts, and enjoy a calm and satisfying experience focused on creativity and relaxation.
70010000122162.intro: Build the workspace you’ve always dreamed of!
70010000122162.name: My Cozy Workspace

70010000105216.description:
Explore the depths of this massive dungeon with your adorable companion Una in this exciting  ROGUE-like deck-building adventure!
Game feature:
• Dynamic Dungeon Layout
Fight through randomly-generated monster-filled dungeons and encounter merchants, treasures and story events. You can only see three levels down, so choose wisely as you push deeper into the dungeon.

• Titillating Card Battles
Build the most powerful deck out of over 50 different cards and 20 different runes and use it to overwhelm your enemies! 

• Random Treasure
Obtain random treasures to upgrade Una's abilities. Put together the strongest combination and synergize it with your deck to deal ungodly amounts of damage!

• An Exciting Story with Multiple Endings
Make choices and experience different endings in this exciting adventure story! Unlock different side stories to trigger various card enchantments. Some enchantments might come in handy, while others might hurt you!
70010000105216.intro: Build your deck and take Una on an epic dungeon adventure!
70010000105216.name: Take Me To The Dungeon!!

70010000124870.description: Command and control your own horde of zombies to defeat your opponents and become the greatest in the arenas. Collect weak humans and turn them into your weapons. The larger your undead army, the greater your chances of domination.
70010000124870.intro: Lead your undead legion to the world domination!
70010000124870.name: Zombie Legion

70010000122749.description:
In a world where the undead have consumed the frontier, survival is the only law left. Step into the boots of a fearless bounty hunter and fight through waves of zombies across cursed towns, abandoned mines, and forgotten wilderness. Unlock powerful survivors, devastating weapons, and loyal companions as you carve your path through the apocalypse.  

- Begin your journey as a lone gunslinger and unlock unique playable characters, each with their own abilities and playstyles.

- Create hundreds of powerful build combinations using a perk system that enhances weapons, triggers explosions, and unleashes elemental powers such as lightning, fire, and ice.

- Fight alongside loyal companions with unique abilities. Some pets strengthen your attacks and skills, while others bring powerful combat abilities of their own.

- Survive against massive zombie hordes, deadly elite enemies, and terrifying bosses that will challenge your reflexes, positioning, and strategy.

- Explore diverse locations ranging from abandoned western towns and graveyards to dark mines, cursed forests, and forgotten frontier outposts. Every location introduces new dangers, secrets, and gameplay opportunities.

- Wield a massive arsenal of weapons, from classic revolvers and lever-action rifles to experimental creations like Tesla gun and explosive heavy weaponry.

- Gather resources and experience during every run to upgrade your characters, pets, weapons, and abilities, allowing you to take on increasingly dangerous enemies.

- Immerse yourself in stylized visuals and a soundtrack inspired by the brutal atmosphere of a zombie-infested Wild West.

- Complete missions to unlock locations and gameplay modifiers.
70010000122749.intro: Survive the frontier. Hunt the undead.
70010000122749.name: Wild West Survivors

70010000124882.description: A fast-paced racing game where you can test your skills and see how you perform on the track. You have to be really fast and make decisions in milliseconds. Avoid all the obstacles and become number one! Customise your Cubics to win in style!
70010000124882.intro: You can't imagine how fast Cubics can be! Try them out and test your skills.
70010000124882.name: Cubic Riders

70010000117930.description:
Overview

Rei, the main character, is a human spirit bound with the challenging duty of defeating mystical entities of nature, the Kami, to obtain their power.

You are free to pick your fights against the Kami in any order. The game features a dynamic difficulty system where each enemy strength is defined by the player’s chosen path. This means that the very same Kami fought at the very beginning could also be the final boss in a different route. Hope to never leave the one you struggle most to fight last!

Combat Features

Besides sword attacks, dodges, head stomps and other basic abilities, Rei will learn a completely new skill for each defeated Kami. Those will provide further depth to your combat arsenal, be it a stronger dash, a weapon that can execute enemies, the ability to heal and many more! 

Player choice is the ultimate power. Taking into account the vastly distinct enemies’ patterns and unique skills granted upon each victory, you will be able to decide how to approach every challenge. It won’t be easy either way, but you can always go back and try something different.

Beyond the Brawl

Gurei is a game about fighting strong enemies, but that’s not all. The Kami inhabit a surreal castle located between the human and spirit worlds. After each victory, Rei comes closer to the realm of spirits, starting to encounter peculiar characters from Japanese mythology. These creatures will add novelty and strangeness to your journey, providing commentary, unique animations, side objectives and obscure secrets.

Unlikely “Friends”

You will get to know the different Kami quite well. When Rei defeats them, she absorbs their power – and their personality. The defeated Kami will be carried around wherever Rei goes, and they’ll surely have stuff to talk about. Sometimes their remarks will be useful information that builds the player’s understanding of the lore and the game mechanics, but sometimes they will be... not so helpful, to put it briefly. Good luck!
70010000117930.intro: An unforgiving game with precise combat. Fight challenging bosses in any order, acquire their unique powers and succeed in your own terms.
70010000117930.name: Gurei

70050000070597.description:
Solid Ice and Terror
Escape the bitter cold outside. Screams echo across the ice, celebrating victories and championships of years past.

A massive industrial hockey arena has been abandoned for years. The lights flicker over empty stands and scarred ice. Mortals enter believing their greatest enemy is the polar vortex, however outside something far worse stalks the rink tonight. What looks cute can be just as terrifying. The officials are watching from beyond.

In Canada, hockey is life—even in the afterlife. Something far worse than the cold stalks the rink on this winter evening. The rules of the natural and the supernatural can change without warning. Some will cry for decades. Others are haunted forever.

Introducing a new level set in an industrial Canadian hockey arena somewhere in Canada. We’ll give you 514 guesses where. Every whistle cuts through the darkness, and every decision feels final.

Beware the supernatural official, Jacques Rougeau, who’s on the job.
“Justice isn’t fair. I don’t care if you get screwed over… bon!"
70050000070597.name: Solid Ice and Terror

70010000107437.description:
A strange melody has swept across Palombia… and all the animals have suddenly started dancing, leaving chaos in their wake! The creature behind this crazy beat is none other than the Mummy Queen, back from the Land of the Dead with her minions to play a cursed concert with a calamitous crescendo.

Help the Marsupilamis save Palombia from the Mummy Queen and her minions! 

A Fast-Paced 2D Platformer
Journey through four vibrant worlds in this high-energy platformer!
From the colourful jungle to the bustling city, find the clues to the Mummy Queen's hideout. Take on increasingly more intense challenges leading to the ultimate showdown against the Mummy Queen. 

3 Marsupilamis, 3 Abilities
Master the unique abilities of each Marsupilami. Switch characters to soar through the air, punch enemies, or leap across obstacles, and explore the different levels' secrets. Choose your Marsupilami wisely, and you might uncover a hidden level!

Experience the Adventure Together in Local Co-Op
Play the adventure with a friend or on your own and take on the Battle Dojos' challenges and the competitive minigames designed for friendly rivalries.

Dive Into a Vibrant, Colourful Universe Faithful to the Marsupilami Licence
Explore unforgettable environments, face memorable bosses, and uncover hidden levels, all set within a fast-paced, fun atmosphere for the whole family.
70010000107437.intro: Will you be able to follow the rhythm… or fall victim to the cursed dance?
70010000107437.name: Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia

70010000101704.description:
Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is a classic-style graphic adventure about a person adrift in space who is rescued by a luxurious space station orbiting Mars. Playing as River, you'll immerse yourself in a world of comfort and pleasure—until you realize the station hides a dark secret.

In Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River, you'll navigate the station's lavish leisure facilities, using your wits to solve puzzles and move forward. As the story unfolds, you’ll begin to uncover the sinister side of the station and must choose whether to ignore it or take action.

The choices you make in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River will challenge your ethics and test your morality. Will you do whatever it takes to protect yourself and survive, or risk everything to expose the truth and stop what's happening on board?

The game's pixel art style creates a stunning, immersive world that captures the spirit of classic adventure games. From the luxurious amenities to the station’s shadowy corners, every location in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is full of character and ready to be explored. Its gripping story will keep you on the edge of your seat. With multiple endings to discover, this is a game you'll want to replay.

Are you ready to embark on a journey of self-discovery and uncover the dark secrets of the space station orbiting Mars?
70010000101704.intro: Uncover the dark truth behind a luxury space station orbiting Mars.
70010000101704.name: Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River

70010000115745.description:
Farming Camp is a cozy, single-player farm management game that follows the journey of an ambitious teenager competing to become the best farmer in the camp. Manage your farm alongside your companions, complete chores for points, and deal with the dynamics of a colorful cast in their teenage years. 

Your path to farming greatness begins!
Step into the boots of young Alessandra, before she became the renowned Evertree Farmer. Experience her life at the Evertree Farming Camp where it all began. Learn the ropes and face the fun and chaos of camp life.

Team up with a lively farming crew
You're not alone on the farm. You’ll have the company of two budding young farmers, each with their own vibe. Assign chores, solve problems, and build friendships as you figure out how to run the farm together.

Heart, humor, and harvests!
Farming’s only half the fun at Evertree Farming Camp. From delightful dramas to silly surprises, and even a few messy moments, there's never a dull day at the camp!

Work hard to take care of the camp
Use the tools at your disposal and climb your way to the top as the camp’s best farming team. Coordinate with your companions and earn points by completing chores, maintaining the camp, attending classes, and tackling missions.  

Have fun and win the competition
Jump into quick and fun minigames that keep things exciting—whether it’s racing against the clock to eliminate pests, chopping wood, cooking delicious meals, and more!

Key Features:
- Embark on a cozy single-player farming adventure and follow a unique, captivating story. 
- Explore a beautifully hand-drawn 2D top-down world full of charming details. 
- Meet a diverse and lovable cast of characters, each with their own quirks, stories, and farming talents. 
- Grow a variety of crops, care for animals, fish, and make your team win the competition.
- Keep your farm thriving with fun and engaging mini-games.
70010000115745.intro: Follow the journey of Alessandra competing to become the best farmer in the camp.
70010000115745.name: Farming Camp

70010000093188.description:
The Cat in the Hat once said, “It’s fun to have fun, but you have to know how.”  

Play with your favorite characters from this exciting Dr. Seuss classic. Enjoy two exciting game modes - ‘Find The Cat’ and catch him before the rest of your opponents do, or test your cake decorating and snowball throwing skills in ‘Minigames’.  With easy controls, varying difficulties, and vibrant visuals, this game has something fun for everyone. Whether you play solo or with friends, your house is about to be full of giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem. 

ELEVATE YOUR GAME NIGHT: Dive into the mayhem solo or race to the end with up to 4 players.  

CLASSIC DR. SEUSS CHARACTERS: Play as Sally, Johnny, Thing 1 & Thing 2 and Little Cat. 

CHOOSE YOUR MODE FOR NON-STOP FUN: Pick from 18 entertaining minigames or find The Cat across 14 rooms. 

BOUNCE, CHASE & PAINT TO WIN: Compete for rewards. Will you find all the stickers for your book? 

A PARTY FOR ALL AGES: Re-play in different ways, with easy controls and varying difficulties.
70010000093188.intro: Join your favorite Dr. Seuss characters in 18 exciting minigames and challenges. Your house is about to be full of giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.
70010000093188.name: The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem

70010000096681.description:
A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Nintendo Switch™, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell’s homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last ditch-effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself on the edge of a hostile system - if there’s any hope of return and rescue he’ll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find.

Forced to confront this celestial expanse head on, Maxwell stays strong - determined to keep his head up and lend a helping hand to everyone he meets on his journey. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can’t keep a good dog down.

Key Features
· Explore jam-packed levels with multiple routes
· Make 50+ friends & collect their friendship cards
· Upgrade your blaster with special abilities
· Find hidden areas and take on a variety of boss battles
· Local couch co-op multiplayer mode
· Bonus prequel content: Chapter Zero
70010000096681.intro: Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
70010000096681.name: Goodboy Galaxy
